backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend that integrates Stripe payment processing (checkout session creation and status retrieval) with role-based access control, requiring admin permission to set Stripe configuration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (student registration fix, WhatsApp CTA buttons, and branding updates) to their affected files, component dependencies, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file with Tailwind directives and OKLCH-based CSS custom properties defining the full design token system for both light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the favicon, page title ('The Rajat's Equation'), and mounting the root div with the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with the app's route tree, wraps the app in a light-mode ThemeProvider, and renders a Sonner toast container.
frontend/src/components/LoadingSpinner.t: Simple animated spinner component with three size variants (sm/md/lg) styled using navy brand colors.
frontend/src/components/NotificationBell: Bell icon component that displays a popover of per-user notifications with an unread count badge and a mark-all-read action, reading from and writing to the local store.
frontend/src/components/ReceiptModal.tsx: Modal dialog that renders a formatted payment receipt by joining payment, student, session, and course data from the local store, including the brand logo and INR amount.
frontend/src/components/StatCard.tsx: Reusable stat card component displaying a title, numeric value, Lucide icon, and optional subtitle with four color theme variants (blue, gold, green, purple).
frontend/src/components/StatusBadge.tsx: Renders a styled badge component for displaying one of seven status values (pending, approved, rejected, etc.) with corresponding color schemes.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Renders a WhatsApp deep-link button that opens a pre-filled message to a hardcoded phone number for booking demo sessions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated identities, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS design tokens for light and dark themes using a deep blue and gold color palette.
frontend/src/layouts/AdminLayout.tsx: Admin portal layout with a responsive sidebar navigation containing links to dashboard, students, courses, sessions, materials, payments, and notifications, including a pending-student badge and logout functionality.
frontend/src/layouts/RootLayout.tsx: Root layout component that initializes the data store on mount and renders child routes via an Outlet.
frontend/src/layouts/StudentLayout.tsx: Student portal layout with a responsive sidebar navigation showing the logged-in student's name, links to student-specific pages, unread notification count, and logout functionality.
frontend/src/lib/auth.ts: Utility module for persisting and retrieving authentication state (user ID, email, name, role, token) in localStorage.
frontend/src/lib/store.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for all data models (User, Student, Course, Session, etc.) and provides localStorage-backed store utilities with default admin and course seed data.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports utility functions for class name merging (cn), and formatting currency (INR), dates, and datetimes for Indian locale.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Courses.tsx: Admin page for managing courses with full CRUD operations (create, edit, delete) stored in localStorage. Includes a modal form with validation, active/inactive toggle, and delete confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard overview page displaying key stats (students, courses, sessions, revenue) and alerts for pending approvals and sessions, with links to relevant admin sections.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Materials.tsx: Admin page for uploading and deleting study materials linked to courses, with course filtering and automatic in-app notifications sent to enrolled students on upload.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Notifications.t: Admin page for composing and sending in-app notifications to all approved students or a specific student, with a history list of sent notifications.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Payments.tsx: Admin page displaying payment records with a revenue summary (total, completed, pending) and a list of individual payments with receipt viewing capability.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Sessions.tsx: Admin page for viewing and managing all sessions with filtering by status, editing meet links and session status, and sending notifications to students when sessions are confirmed.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Students.tsx: Admin page for listing, searching, filtering, approving/rejecting students, and managing their course enrollments, with notifications sent on status changes.
frontend/src/pages/Landing.tsx: Public landing page for 'The Rajat's Equation' tutoring service, displaying course listings, testimonials, and navigation with a WhatsApp contact button.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page supporting both admin and student roles, validating credentials against localStorage store and redirecting to the appropriate dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Simple payment failure page displaying an error message with links to retry booking or return to the student dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Payment success page that processes any pending payment from sessionStorage, updates payment and session statuses in the store, and notifies the admin.
frontend/src/pages/Register.tsx: Student registration page with form validation that creates a new user and a pending student record in localStorage, then redirects to login awaiting admin approval.
frontend/src/pages/student/Book.tsx: Multi-step session booking page for students to select a course, session type, date, time, and duration, then submit a pending session to the store.
frontend/src/pages/student/Courses.tsx: Student page displaying enrolled courses with details like price, level, and description, and links to view materials or book a session.
frontend/src/pages/student/Dashboard.tsx: Student dashboard showing account status (pending/rejected/approved), quick links to courses, sessions, materials, and notifications, plus upcoming confirmed sessions.
frontend/src/pages/student/Materials.tsx: Student-facing page that displays study materials filtered by enrolled courses, showing file type badges and links, with an empty state if not enrolled.
frontend/src/pages/student/Payments.tsx: Student payment history page showing a summary of total paid, completed, and pending payments, with a receipt modal for individual payment details.
frontend/src/pages/student/Profile.tsx: Student profile page allowing the user to view and edit their name and phone number, copy their access code, and see enrolled courses.
frontend/src/pages/student/Sessions.tsx: Student sessions page displaying upcoming and past sessions in tabs, with session details like date, time, meet link, and price.
frontend/src/routeTree.ts: Defines the full TanStack Router route tree for the app, including public, admin, and student routes with role-based authentication guards.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom color palette (oklch variables, navy, gold), typography/container-queries/animate plugins, and custom keyframes for accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot for MathTutor Pro describing the full-stack architecture (React/TypeScript + Node.js/Express + SQLite), existing features, known issues (broken student registration), and image requirements.
